== Notes for [[Item:Q113359|Q113359]] ==

1 Gonzalo Garcia de Castilla d. 1011 m. NN
>2 '''Munio González''' d. 1047??? (?conde de Alava) m. Tigridia Ansurez
>>3 Gonzalo Muñoz, Conde de Asturias, lord of Santillana d. 1053/ d 1026 m. Eyla Muñoz
>>>4 Munio González, Conde de Asturias d. 1097/ d abt 1085 m. Maior
>>>>5 Jimena Munoz d. 1128 (mistress of Alfonso VI)

''in: Asturias, lords of Santillana <http://www.nntpnews.info/threads/9835255-Asturias-lords-of-Santillana>''

_____________________________________________________________________________

=Conde das Astúrias Gonçalo Munoz=

* Born: Abt 1010
* Marriage: Eylo Munoz
* Died: 1053 about age 43

==Parents==

Father: Gonçalo Garcia de Castela (Abt 970-1011)
Mother: unkn

==Spouses/Children:==

Eylo Munoz (Eylo Munoz was born about 1010.)

>Conde das Astúrias Munio Gonzalez+

in: <http://online.uminho.pt/pessoas/mrui/Acerca/PaesPereira/1155.htm>

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
